ddls:
CREATE TABLE "employees" (
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each employee */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date the employee joined the company */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the employee */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company the employee belongs to (e.g., Product, Service) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the employee */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the employee belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the employee */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the employee */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the employee */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the employee */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the employee */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employees_company_type FOREIGN KEY ("company_type") REFERENCES companies ("company_type")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of company (e.g., Product, Service) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the company operates in */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the company */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the company is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the company is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the company is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "designations" (
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each designation */,
  "designation_name" TEXT /* Name of the designation */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Description of the job */,
  "reporting_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the reporting manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "resource_allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "resource_allocation" INTEGER /* Resource allocation value */,
  "allocation_date" TEXT /* Date the resource was allocated */,
  "allocated_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who allocated the resource */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mental_fatigue_scores" (
  "mental_fatigue_score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mental fatigue score */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "mental_fatigue_score" REAL /* Mental fatigue score value */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the mental fatigue score was evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who evaluated the mental fatigue score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mental_fatigue_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mental_fatigue_scores_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "burn_rates" (
  "burn_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each burn rate */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "burn_rate" REAL /* Burn rate value */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date the burn rate was evaluated */,
  "evaluator_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who evaluated the burn rate */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("burn_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_burn_rates_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wfh_setups" (
  "wfh_setup_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each WFH setup */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "wfh_setup_available" INTEGER /* Whether WFH setup is available for the employee */,
  "setup_date" TEXT /* Date the WFH setup was set up */,
  "setup_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who set up the WFH setup */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wfh_setup_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wfh_setups_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employee_performance" (
  "employee_performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employee performance record */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "designation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's designation */,
  "resource_allocation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's resource allocation */,
  "mental_fatigue_score_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's mental fatigue score */,
  "burn_rate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the employee's burn rate */,
  "performance_rating" REAL /* Performance rating of the employee */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was reviewed */,
  "reviewer_id" TEXT /* ID of the person who reviewed the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employee_performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_mental_fatigue_score_id FOREIGN KEY ("mental_fatigue_score_id") REFERENCES mental_fatigue_scores ("mental_fatigue_score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_burn_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("burn_rate_id") REFERENCES burn_rates ("burn_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_resource_allocation_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_allocation_id") REFERENCES resource_allocations ("resource_allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employee_performance_designation_id FOREIGN KEY ("designation_id") REFERENCES designations ("designation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hr_admins" (
  "hr_admin_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each HR administrator */,
  "hr_admin_name" TEXT /* Name of the HR administrator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the HR administrator */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the HR administrator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the HR administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hr_admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_assignments" (
  "role_assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "hr_admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HR administrator */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the HR administrator */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  "assigned_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who assigned the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_assignments_hr_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("hr_admin_id") REFERENCES hr_admins ("hr_admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "hr_admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the HR administrator accessing the data */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee whose data is being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "accessed_data" TEXT /* Description of the data accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_hr_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("hr_admin_id") REFERENCES hr_admins ("hr_admin_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survey_responses" (
  "survey_response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey response */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was responded */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survey_responses_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "survey_name" TEXT /* Name of the survey */,
  "survey_description" TEXT /* Description of the survey */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who created the survey */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the survey was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interventions" (
  "intervention_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each intervention */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* ID of the employee */,
  "intervention_name" TEXT /* Name of the intervention */,
  "intervention_description" TEXT /* Description of the intervention */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* ID of the person who created the intervention */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the intervention was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("intervention_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interventions_employee_id FOREIGN KEY ("employee_id") REFERENCES employees ("employee_id")
)
